steps.title: Spot the exception that needs explaining
steps.content: The first sentence establishes a contrast: neon isolated quickly, but “this wasn't the case with all elements.” The next sentence must elaborate on how that exception actually appears.

steps.title: Choose the transition that explains the exception
steps.content:
”Sometimes the isolation process took years” directly supplies this elaboration: for some instances, the process took years.
The other three either falsely introduce a contrast (However), create a nonexistent consequence relationship (Thus), or add information without explanation (Moreover). That matches choice C — C is correct.
